text: My card is stolen!! Block it now please!
Hey, I was charged $20 for a subscription I cancelled last week. I want my money back.
How do I change my profile picture?
I tried to withdraw money but the ATM just ate my card. I am stuck in London and have no cash. HELP.
Your app is blue. I like red better. Also I want a refund for the monthly fee because of the color.
